program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Explaining the oncology network and its services -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- Your Field -- The Oncology Network
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 3 -- Your Field: The Oncology Network

listenings.text: Hello, I am Doctor Lima, and I work in the Oncology Network. Let me explain what we do. First, a patient arrives at the hospital. Then, our team develops a treatment plan. Next, we provide modern care and new therapies. We also improve the process every year. Today, the network offers services in many cities, and the cost for each patient is lower. Many patients get a cure, and that is our goal.

Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. A partner from Chile wants to visit the Oncology Network next month. He wants to understand how the network provides care. Please prepare a short tour. Show him the treatment process, the new therapies you develop, and the services for patients. He also wants to know about the cost. Thank you, and talk soon.
